title: QROutputID Property
description: Sets whether to include the data carrier identifier in the QR code Text result.
notes:
For this version, the data carrier identifier is fixed at "]Q0".

Setting range: True / False

Default: False

See Also: QROutputID Property

QRLargeSize Property

Vision Objects: QROutputID Property

Code Reader

Applies To

Vision Objects: Code Reader
